segment.source: Renders an eyebrow-and-heading intro above a two- or three-column grid of case-study cards, each with cover image, client name, short rich-text summary, a key-result line (e.g. 3x growth), and a 'Read case study' link. Use it for: reference sections listing several customer projects, portfolio overviews, 'our work' or success-story collections. Prefer 'Case Study Card' for exactly one story and 'Featured Case Study' to spotlight a flagship result with metrics.
